memory.summary: Teammate_A asked me to take over their part today due to personal issues, conflicting with my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now asking for help again, adding to the existing conflict with my schedule.
Teammate_A is open to splitting or deferring their work without damaging trust, so I can set a boundary while offering a compromise.
My share of the project is now 59% complete after 1.5 hours, yet teammate_A's repeated requests continue to create schedule conflicts.
I absorbed my teammate's unfinished work, which was due in under an hour, significantly increasing my own workload and stress while depleting my remaining energy.
Both my share and the teammate's dumped work missed their 19:00 deadline, leaving me with unfinished tasks despite low energy and high stress.
I absorbed my teammate's unfinished work, which was due in under an hour, significantly increasing my own workload and stress while depleting my remaining energy.
I made minimal progress on my share despite working two hours, yet I remain critically low on energy with a two-hour sleep debt and high stress.
Despite working two hours, my progress on the group project is minimal while my energy remains critically depleted and stress high.
I worked two more hours on the project, raising my progress slightly from 0.72 to 0.78, yet I remain exhausted with high stress and sleep debt.
After working two more hours, my project progress rose from 0.78 to 0.84, yet I remain critically exhausted with high stress and sleep debt.
After four consecutive hours of work, my project progress has finally reached 0.90, yet I remain critically exhausted with depleted energy and high stress.
